QA-09 -001 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa09 html lang attribute present
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa09_html_lang_attribute_present 🕐 2026-05-22 04:21:06 ⏱ 15.00s
📋 What this test was checking
<html> must have a valid `lang` attribute (en for /en, ar for /ar) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
<html> must have a valid `lang` attribute (en for /en, ar for /ar).
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
